Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a textual description of a hiring process We need to create two POWL models one with potential unfairness due to an XOR branch for community affiliation and one without Steps from the description 1 Resume Parsing Initial Data Check This is an automated scan Missing information triggers a loop process where the applicant is asked to provide additional details before proceeding We can model this as a loop First the resume is parsed and checked for completeness If incomplete we request more information and then re check This is a loop between two activities DataCompletenessCheck which might include parsing and checking and RequestMoreInfo 2 Preliminary Skill Assessment After the data is complete applicants take a skill test We can represent this as SkillAssessment

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3 Cultural Fit Community Affiliation Check Potential Bias Point In the unfair model There is an XOR branch after the skill assessment One branch is the standard cultural fit check and the other is a community affiliation check that gives a subtle advantage In the fair model All applicants undergo the same cultural fit check so no XOR branch 4 Managerial Review Final Decision After the cultural fit step whichever branch is taken there is a managerial review and then a final decision We can represent these as ManagerialReview and FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For the unfair model we have an XOR choice between two activities CulturalFitCheck and CommunityAffiliationCheck Note that the description says either you go through a standard cultural fit assessment or you take a path where community affiliation leads to implicit score adjustments So we model that as an XOR In the fair model we remove the XOR and only have the CulturalFitCheck

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: We must also note that the process has a loop for data completeness We model that as a loop between two activities DataCompletenessCheck and RequestMoreInfo The loop works as execute DataCompletenessCheck then either exit the loop or execute RequestMoreInfo and then DataCompletenessCheck again Now lets define the activities ReceiveApplication The initial step of receiving the application we might include this as the start but note that the loop is on data completeness The description says Once the basic application data is received then step 1 So we can start with an activity for receiving the application then the loop But note the loop is part of step 1 So we can have After receiving the application we do a data completeness check If incomplete we request more info and then check again So lets define the activities ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Now for the unfair model We have a loop DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo after ReceiveApplication Then after the loop we do SkillAssessment Then we have an XOR either CulturalFitCheck or CommunityAffiliationCheck Then we do ManagerialReview and then FinalDecision We can build a partial order with nodes ReceiveApplication loop SkillAssessment xor ManagerialReview FinalDecision and add edges ReceiveApplication loop SkillAssessment xor ManagerialReview FinalDecision Fair Model ReceiveApplication loop SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision with edges ReceiveApplication loop SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision We must define the activities as Transition objects with appropriate labels Receive Application Data Completeness Check Request More Info Skill Assessment Cultural Fit Check Community Affiliation Check Managerial Review Final Decision Lets code accordingly
